raw_excerpt: Regulations.gov docket FDA-2025-N-6895. Document title: Pharmacy Compounding Advisory Committee; Notice of Meeting; Establishment of a Public Docket; Request for Comments--Bulk Drug Substances Nominated for Inclusion on the Section 503A Bulk Drug Substances List. Document ID: FDA-2025-N-6895-0001. Comment Due Date: 07/22/2026. 65 comments received. Docket Title: Pharmacy Compounding Advisory Committee; Notice of Meeting; Establishment of a Public Docket; Request for Comments--Bulk Drug Substances Nominated for Inclusion on the Section 503A Bulk Drug Substances List. Docket Number: FDA-2025-N-6895. Note: This is the official comment-collection docket for the April 16 2026 Federal Register notice. The FDA's meeting page additionally cites 'Docket No. FDA-2026-N-2979' in one of its instructions paragraphs (under Public Participation Information) — a possible docket-number typo or an updated secondary docket, flagged for adjudication. Source link for the parallel comment-collection instructions: https://www.regulations.gov.
